modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Questioning legitimacy of email from Campus Clarity training.

full_description_text:  
El usuario ha recibido un correo electrónico de Campus Clarity. Se pregunta si este es un entrenamiento legítimo. Hay dudas sobre la autenticidad del mensaje recibido.
short_description: Questioning legitimacy of email from Campus Clarity training.
description: El usuario ha recibido un correo electrónico de Campus Clarity. Se pregunta si este es un entrenamiento legítimo. Hay dudas sobre la autenticidad del mensaje recibido.
